title: Feature is not available on stable Rust
explanation: This error occurs when you try to use a feature that is only available in nightly Rust but you are compiling with the stable compiler. Feature gates protect unstable APIs and syntax.
error_message: error[E0554]: `#![feature]` may not be used on the stable release channel

fixes.code:
# Install and use nightly:
rustup install nightly
rustup run nightly cargo build

# Or set for the project:
rustup override set nightly

tip: Before using nightly, check if the feature has been stabilized in a recent Rust version. Run `rustup update` to get the latest stable features.
